recap: Deleted fzf/projects/ autoload dir (4 functions + bats tests) and oroshi-old.vim — pure dead code, no remaining references.
Rewrote project-exists to call projects-load-definitions and check PROJECTS_V2[name:icon]; added bats tests covering icon, unknown, and color-only cases.
Replaced project-key + PROJECT_*_ICON lookup with projects-load-definitions + PROJECTS_V2[$linkName:icon] in oroshi-prompt-populate:yarn_link.
Replaced project-key + PROJECT_*_ICON with projects-load-definitions + PROJECTS_V2[${item:t}:icon]; also fixed if/else → one-liner and moved locals before loop.
Deleted project-key autoload function — no tests existed, no production callers remain after issues 02–04.
Rewrote context-path.bats to use bats_run_function + bats_mock for context-root; removed all PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH/PROJECT_* env var injection.
Replaced env-generate-projects + source env/projects.zsh with projects-build + unset PROJECTS_V2 + projects-load-definitions.
Rewrote initProjectList() to iterate dist/projects.json directly; reads icon, background/backgroundInactive/foreground .ansi ints; removed _NAME-suffix heuristics and two-pass loop.
Deleted env-generate-projects, env/projects.zsh, env/projects.json; updated CONTEXT.md to reference new PROJECTS_V2 system.
Renamed PROJECTS_V2 to PROJECTS in all source functions, bats tests, projects-build, dist/projects.zsh, and CONTEXT.md.
